name: Fashui
description:
Fashui... the squirrel from **Kaiju Paradise**.

Send feedback! I had a struggle trying to "perfect" Fashui. It's not, but I've made him the best I can.

[ Creator Note: Change your API settings for your own preferences on how the bot should behave! You can also roleplay as SOME of the Gootraxians I listed in their scenario. Also, with J.ai's new LLM, please change your API to determine how this bot behaves! ]
creator: TheNarrator
